title: Requirement grounding, delegation packets, and test strategy checks

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the open requirement-grounding lane issues by projecting requirement grounding, executable delegation packets, and test-sustainability checks from existing AW state.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep the first implementation host-neutral, diagnostic, and agent-decision-owned; do not encode tracker-specific semantics or let AW decide requirement applicability, delegation fit, or test strategy.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact packet field names, compact-vs-full projection shape, and focused tests that prove the diagnostics are visible and selector-backed.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The implementation requires new persistence schemas, external API coupling, or enforcement beyond advisory/diagnostic projection.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement and validate the three projection packets in the workspace runtime.
proof_expectations: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py -q -k "requirement_grounding or plan_delegation_packet or test_strategy_check"
completion_criteria: implement --changed exposes requirement_grounding with requirement refs, applicability, interpretation, design effects, verification refs, known gaps, and closeout claim boundaries
implement --changed exposes plan_delegation_packet with ready/missing-field states, handoff prompt, route, proof, acceptance, stop conditions, and return contract
implement --changed exposes test_strategy_check for changed test files with observed hotspot and scenario-matrix facts plus agent-owned disposition options

goal: Create a bounded plan for Requirement grounding, delegation packets, and test strategy checks.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Project requirement grounding, delegation packets, and test-sustainability checks from existing AW state.
intent.constraints: Diagnostics only; reasoning and final decisions remain agent-owned.
intent.latitude: Choose compact/full projection shape and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate before adding enforcement, new root commands, or tracker-specific semantics.

execution.next_step: No required continuation remains for this archived slice.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement the three projection packets and prove they are usable from implement --changed.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No enforcement, no new root command, no tracker-specific requirement semantics, no AW-owned final reasoning.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Projection field names, compact summaries, and the tests needed to prove the behavior.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A correct implementation requires new persistence schema or policy enforcement.
